name: Ansys, Inc.
lede: Ansys runs two centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Bengaluru, covering GBS and IT, built over 25 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Ansys office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Ansys, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Ansys runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Bengaluru), covering GBS and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Ansys's India footprint covers Pune and Bengaluru, spanning GBS and IT. The centers deliver IT, HR, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 24 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Ansys operate in India?
faq.a: Ansys operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.a: Ansys's India footprint includes Pune and 1 additional cities.

faq.a: Ansys runs GBS and 1 additional center types centers in India.
